title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core of read, write, edit, and bash commands, extensible via npm and git. It supports any LLM backend including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, offering a cost-effective alternative to frontier model rate limits.
